What this Privacy Policy coversThis Privacy Policy (the Policy hereinafter) covers any information that may include personal information, which the Limited Liability Company SuperJob may obtain when you use the Mobile App (the App hereinafter).By using the App you provide your consent to processing your personal information by SuperJob, LLC (the Operator hereinafter).

Who processes informationIn order to provide correct functioning of the Apps your personal information are processed by SuperJob, LLC, a legal entity incorporated under the Russian laws and located at 4-36 Г, suite I, floor 3, 20 M. Dmitrovka st,., Moscow 127006 (TIN 7702319337).

heading_content_part: Where your Personal Information is stored and processedYour Personal Information will be stored and processed in the Russian Federation. The Operator will not transfer your Personal Information to other jurisdictions.

decoder_heading: How long we store your Personal Information
ident_heading: How long we store your Personal Information
heading_content_part: How long we store your Personal InformationYour consent to processing your Personal Information will be valid until it’s withdrawn or until the purpose of its communication is achieved, whichever comes first. A withdrawal can be communicated by a written application to the Operator’s address.

Your rightsYou have the right, at your own discretion, to withdraw, exclude, set restrictions imposed to a list and categories of personal information allowed for disclosure by delivering a respective written request to the Operator’s e-mail. address cv@superjob.ru. The above request must include the last name, name, patronymic (if any), contact details (telephone number, e-mail or postal address) of the owner of the personal information, and a list of personal information which processing is subject to termination.
